subject: [RFC PATCH 19/45] mm: page_alloc: prevent atomic allocations from tainting clean SPBs

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch prevents atomic allocations from tainting clean superpage blocks (SPBs) by introducing two changes to the page allocation process. First, it extends the Pass 2 of __rmqueue_smallest to search for sub-pageblock-order free blocks in tainted SPBs and attempts to claim them using try_to_claim_block. Second, it introduces an intermediate flag ALLOC_NOFRAG_TAINTED_OK that allows atomic allocations to steal from tainted SPBs before dropping protection entirely. This approach aims to prevent the primary source of taint spreading observed on production systems.
